steps.title: Find the accomplishment
steps.content: The student wants an accomplishment of the NCAI. Founding details and leadership identify the organization, but the notes describe an achievement when they say NCAI advocacy was a key factor in the passing of Public Law 96-638.

steps.title: Avoid founding details
steps.content: Choice A focuses on founding and the first president. Choice B describes the NCAI's creation. Choice D wrongly says the NCAI passed the law, though Congress did. The choice about NCAI advocacy helping pass legislation acknowledging tribal self-governance identifies an accomplishment. The answer is C.
